response.justification: Bogdan brings roughly 17 years of broad, hands-on software engineering experience and some recent AI-adjacent work (MCP frameworks, agentic tooling at re:cinq), but the role demands a director-level individual contributor with recognized, demonstrated AI strategy expertise, cloud-platform advisory experience, and the ability to influence strategic customers and executive stakeholders. His career arc is that of a senior/staff-level implementer — skilled and versatile, but without the strategic seniority, AI thought-leadership track record, or cloud-at-scale architecture depth this position requires. The absence of an advanced AI degree and any evidence of external advisory or executive-level influence further widens the gap.
strengths: Exceeds the 15-year experience floor with ~17–20 years spanning web, mobile, embedded, low-latency systems, and now AI-agent infrastructure.
Genuine entrepreneurial signal: founded GISCollective, shipped multiple open-source projects (Fluent-Asserts, Trial, vibe.dav), and delivered public talks/workshops.
Current role includes direct work on MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks, providing relevant (if early-stage) AI builder fluency.
concerns: No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in AI or a related field, and AI-specific work is limited to roughly one year in the most recent role.
Career seniority plateaus at Staff/Senior Developer — no evidence of director-level IC scope, cross-org AI strategy ownership, or executive advisory relationships.
Cloud expertise is narrow (AWS CDK in one role); no demonstrated cloud-platform strategy, large-scale infrastructure design, or customer-facing technical advisory at enterprise scale.
